foundations/cpp-language.title: Foundations -> C++ Language
foundations/cpp-language.summary: Core C++ contest toolkit: fast I/O, references and value semantics, STL primitives, and the subset of the language that matters most under time pressure.

foundations/stl.title: Foundations -> STL Basics
foundations/stl.summary: Container and algorithm fluency: build the habit of reaching for `vector`, `set`, `map`, iterators, and standard algorithms before writing custom machinery.

foundations/complexity-and-invariants.title: Foundations -> Complexity And Invariants
foundations/complexity-and-invariants.summary: Reasoning tools for contests: estimate time honestly, define loop invariants, and learn to justify greedy and implementation choices before coding.

foundations/sorting.title: Foundations -> Sorting
foundations/sorting.summary: Sorting as a modeling tool: order data to expose monotonicity, simplify sweeps, or make greedy decisions provable.

foundations/binary-search.title: Foundations -> Binary Search
foundations/binary-search.summary: Search on sorted data and on monotone answers: learn the invariant-first template before memorizing implementations.

foundations/prefix-sums.title: Foundations -> Prefix Sums
foundations/prefix-sums.summary: Turn many range questions into subtraction of precomputed aggregates, then layer counting tricks on top.

learning_sources.label: OI Wiki prefix sum and adjacent difference

foundations/difference-arrays.title: Foundations -> Difference Arrays
foundations/difference-arrays.summary: A range-update perspective on prefix sums: store changes at boundaries, then recover the real array by taking prefixes.

learning_sources.label: OI Wiki prefix sum and adjacent difference

foundations/two-pointers.title: Foundations -> Two Pointers
foundations/two-pointers.summary: Exploit monotone movement to replace nested loops with linear scans, sliding windows, or opposite-end sweeps.

data-structures/dsu.title: Data Structures -> DSU
data-structures/dsu.summary: Union-find for component maintenance, offline connectivity, and Kruskal-style structure building.

data-structures/fenwick-tree.title: Data Structures -> Fenwick Tree
data-structures/fenwick-tree.summary: Low-level prefix structure for point updates, range sums, compressed coordinates, and order statistics.

data-structures/segment-tree.title: Data Structures -> Segment Tree
data-structures/segment-tree.summary: General range query/update structure built on monoids and lazy propagation, with tree walking for advanced queries.

data-structures/lazy-segment-tree.title: Data Structures -> Lazy Segment Tree
data-structures/lazy-segment-tree.summary: Deferred-tag segment tree for online range updates and range queries when a full segment can absorb the update in closed form.

data-structures/segment-tree-beats.title: Data Structures -> Segment Tree Beats
data-structures/segment-tree-beats.summary: Richer segment-tree summaries for online range chmin / chmax / add / sum when ordinary lazy tags stop closing cleanly.

learning_sources.label: Codeforces simple introduction to Segment Tree Beats
Library Checker Range Chmin Chmax Add Range Sum

repo_companions.label: Range Chmin Chmax Add Range Sum note

data-structures/dsu-rollback.title: Data Structures -> DSU Rollback / Offline Dynamic Connectivity
data-structures/dsu-rollback.summary: Rollback-friendly union-find plus segment tree over time for offline add/remove connectivity timelines.

learning_sources.label: CP-Algorithms deleting from a data structure in O(T(n) log n)

data-structures/persistent-data-structur.title: Data Structures -> Persistent Data Structures
data-structures/persistent-data-structur.summary: Path-copying data structures where updates create new version roots and old snapshots remain queryable.

data-structures/mos-algorithm.title: Data Structures -> Mo's Algorithm
data-structures/mos-algorithm.summary: Offline range-query ordering for static arrays when one current active interval can be updated cheaply by moving endpoints.

practice_sources.label: Library Checker Static Range Count Distinct

data-structures/binary-trie-xor.title: Data Structures -> Binary Trie / XOR Queries
data-structures/binary-trie-xor.summary: Fixed-width bit-prefix trie for live insert / erase / maximum-xor queries against one multiset of non-negative integers.

data-structures/wavelet-tree.title: Data Structures -> Wavelet Tree
data-structures/wavelet-tree.summary: Static range order-statistics and value-counting structure that rewrites one queried interval through value partitions with prefix-left counts.

learning_sources.label: IOI Journal Wavelet Trees for Competitive Programming

data-structures/treap-implicit.title: Data Structures -> Treap / Implicit Treap
data-structures/treap-implicit.summary: Randomized split/merge tree family for ordered-set-by-key treaps and mutable-sequence-by-position implicit treaps.

practice_sources.label: Library Checker Dynamic Sequence Range Affine Range Sum

data-structures/sparse-table.title: Data Structures -> Sparse Table
data-structures/sparse-table.summary: Static range query structure for idempotent operations such as RMQ and LCA reductions.

learning_sources.label: USACO Guide Euler Tour / Static RMQ

data-structures/heaps-and-ordered-sets.title: Data Structures -> Heaps And Ordered Sets
data-structures/heaps-and-ordered-sets.summary: Use heaps, sets, and multisets to maintain online minima/maxima, medians, and active sets.

data-structures/offline-tricks.title: Data Structures -> Offline Tricks
data-structures/offline-tricks.summary: Sort events, reorder queries, and use rollback or CDQ to trade interactivity for structure.

learning_sources.label: USACO Guide range queries with sweep line
OI Wiki CDQ divide and conquer

graphs/graph-modeling.title: Graphs -> Graph Modeling
graphs/graph-modeling.summary: Before running graph algorithms, decide what the nodes, edges, states, and weights actually represent.

graphs/bfs-dfs.title: Graphs -> BFS And DFS
graphs/bfs-dfs.summary: Traversal for reachability, layering, components, bipartiteness, and DFS-tree structure.

graphs/bridges-articulation.title: Graphs -> Bridges, Articulation, And BCC
graphs/bridges-articulation.summary: Low-link structure in undirected graphs: critical edges, critical vertices, and block-cut style decomposition.

graphs/euler-tour-subtree.title: Graphs -> Euler Tour / Subtree Queries
graphs/euler-tour-subtree.summary: Flatten one rooted subtree into one contiguous interval so subtree-only queries become array range queries.

graphs/eulerian-path-cycle.title: Graphs -> Eulerian Path / Cycle
graphs/eulerian-path-cycle.summary: Degree conditions, Hierholzer traversal, and use-every-edge-once constructions in directed and undirected graphs.

graphs/centroid-decomposition.title: Graphs -> Centroid Decomposition
graphs/centroid-decomposition.summary: Balanced recursive tree splitting, centroid-tree ancestors, and path-through-centroid divide and conquer on static trees.

graphs/shortest-paths.title: Graphs -> Shortest Paths
graphs/shortest-paths.summary: From BFS and DAG DP to Dijkstra and Bellman-Ford, pick the shortest-path tool that matches the edge model.

learning_sources.label: MIT 6.006 Dijkstra and DAG shortest paths

graphs/mst.title: Graphs -> Minimum Spanning Tree
graphs/mst.summary: Use cut and cycle properties to build minimum spanning forests with Kruskal or Prim.

graphs/scc-toposort.title: Graphs -> Topological Sort And SCC
graphs/scc-toposort.summary: Compress directed graphs into DAGs, reason about dependencies, and detect strongly connected structure.

graphs/two-sat.title: Graphs -> Two-SAT
graphs/two-sat.summary: Boolean variables, implication graphs, and SCC-based feasibility plus assignment extraction.

learning_sources.label: Aspvall, Plass, Tarjan - A Linear-Time Algorithm for Testing the Truth of Certain Quantified Boolean Formulas

graphs/trees.title: Graphs -> Trees
graphs/trees.summary: Tree structure, rooting, Euler tours, diameters, and decomposition ideas that power most advanced tree problems.

graphs/lca.title: Graphs -> LCA
graphs/lca.summary: Lowest common ancestor as a reusable primitive for ancestor checks and path queries on rooted trees.

graphs/tree-dp.title: Graphs -> Tree DP
graphs/tree-dp.summary: Tree-rooted dynamic programming from local subtree states to rerooting and path decomposition.

graphs/flow.title: Graphs -> Maximum Flow
graphs/flow.summary: Residual graphs, augmenting paths, and cut structure for max-flow and min-cut modeling.

graphs/flow-lower-bounds.title: Graphs -> Flow With Lower Bounds
graphs/flow-lower-bounds.summary: Feasible circulation and lower/upper edge bounds reduced to one saturating max-flow check with super source and super sink.

learning_sources.label: USACO Guide flow with lower bounds

repo_companions.label: Flow With Lower Bounds hot sheet

graphs/min-cost-flow.title: Graphs -> Min-Cost Flow
graphs/min-cost-flow.summary: Successive shortest augmenting paths, potentials, and reduced costs for transportation-style optimization.

graphs/matching.title: Graphs -> Matching
graphs/matching.summary: Augmenting-path techniques for bipartite matching and reductions to cover and assignment problems.

graphs/hld.title: Graphs -> Heavy-Light Decomposition
graphs/hld.summary: Decompose tree paths into logarithmically many chains so path queries and updates reduce to range structures.

graphs/gomory-hu.title: Graphs -> Gomory-Hu Tree
graphs/gomory-hu.summary: Advanced cut-tree technique for all-pairs min-cut queries in undirected graphs.

dp/foundations.title: DP -> Foundations
dp/foundations.summary: State design, transitions, and the discipline of converting brute force recurrence thinking into efficient DP.

dp/knapsack-family.title: DP -> Knapsack Family
dp/knapsack-family.summary: Choose the state dimension and transition order that matches 0-1, complete, bounded, or value-based knapsack.

dp/bitmask-dp.title: DP -> Bitmask DP
dp/bitmask-dp.summary: Compress small subsets into bitmasks and reason about transitions over subsets, submasks, or profiles.

dp/tree-dp.title: DP -> Tree DP
dp/tree-dp.summary: DP on rooted trees, rerooting, subtree merges, and local state design for hierarchical structures.

dp/digit-dp.title: DP -> Digit DP
dp/digit-dp.summary: Count or optimize over numeric ranges by scanning digits left-to-right with tight and leading-zero flags.

dp/cht-li-chao.title: DP -> Convex Hull Trick / Li Chao Tree
dp/cht-li-chao.summary: Affine-DP optimization where previous states become lines and current states become point queries.

learning_sources.label: cp-algorithms Convex Hull Trick and Li Chao tree

practice_sources.label: Library Checker Line Add Get Min

dp/interval-dp.title: DP -> Interval DP
dp/interval-dp.summary: Reason over contiguous ranges and split points when the optimal structure is built by merging intervals.

dp/sliding-window.title: DP -> Sliding Window And Window DP
dp/sliding-window.summary: Problems where a moving window carries state, costs, or feasibility information that updates incrementally.

math/modular-arithmetic.title: Math -> Modular Arithmetic
math/modular-arithmetic.summary: Safe modular computation: powers, inverses, congruences, and the algebra needed to avoid overflow and mistakes.

math/chinese-remainder.title: Math -> Chinese Remainder And Linear Congruences
math/chinese-remainder.summary: Congruence systems, gcd-consistent residue merges, and the extended-Euclid doorway from linear congruences to one merged class modulo lcm.

practice_sources.label: Library Checker System of Linear Congruence

math/lucas-theorem.title: Math -> Lucas Theorem And Large Binomial Mod Prime
math/lucas-theorem.summary: Prime-mod binomial coefficients beyond one factorial table, using base-p digit decomposition and Lucas theorem when n crosses p.

math/mobius-multiplicative.title: Math -> Mobius And Multiplicative Counting
math/mobius-multiplicative.summary: Divisor-structured inclusion-exclusion, Mobius cancellation, and multiplicative counting over multiples using one linear sieve plus one divisor-frequency sweep.

math/linear-recurrence.title: Math -> Linear Recurrence And Matrix Exponentiation
math/linear-recurrence.summary: Fixed-width linear recurrences and repeated small linear transitions, turned into companion matrices and powered quickly by repeated squaring.

math/probability.title: Math -> Probability
math/probability.summary: Finite-state probability modeling with PMFs, expectation, total probability, and exact discrete-process DP.

math/xor-basis.title: Math -> XOR Basis / Linear Basis
math/xor-basis.summary: Gaussian elimination over GF(2) for subset-xor span, representability, maximum subset xor, and cycle-space xor reductions.

math/game-theory.title: Math -> Game Theory / Sprague-Grundy
math/game-theory.summary: Impartial normal-play game modeling with mex-defined Grundy values and xor across independent subgames.

math/number-theory-basics.title: Math -> Number Theory Basics
math/number-theory-basics.summary: Divisibility, primes, totients, divisor functions, and the standard multiplicative toolbox of contest number theory.

math/gcd-lcm.title: Math -> GCD And LCM
math/gcd-lcm.summary: Euclidean algorithm, Bézout identities, and the way gcd/lcm structure propagates through arrays and constructions.

math/fft.title: Math -> FFT And NTT
math/fft.summary: Polynomial multiplication and convolution with roots of unity, integer-friendly NTTs, and transform implementation details.

combinatorics/counting-basics.title: Combinatorics -> Counting Basics
combinatorics/counting-basics.summary: Factorials, binomials, arrangements, stars and bars, and the basic models that recur across counting problems.

combinatorics/inclusion-exclusion.title: Combinatorics -> Inclusion-Exclusion
combinatorics/inclusion-exclusion.summary: Count by overlaps, complements, and Mobius-style corrections when direct counting double-counts structure.

combinatorics/bounded-compositions.title: Combinatorics -> Bounded Compositions
combinatorics/bounded-compositions.summary: Distribute sums under lower and upper bounds using stars and bars, generating functions, or inclusion-exclusion.

combinatorics/lexicographic-enumeration.title: Combinatorics -> Lexicographic Enumeration
combinatorics/lexicographic-enumeration.summary: Generate, count, or skip combinatorial objects in lexicographic order using ranks, next-state transitions, and pruning.

strings/hashing.title: Strings -> Hashing
strings/hashing.summary: Rolling hashes for substring equality, borders, Rabin-Karp style matching, and collision-aware verification.

strings/kmp.title: Strings -> KMP
strings/kmp.summary: Prefix-function reasoning for exact pattern matching, borders, periods, and automaton interpretations.

strings/palindromes.title: Strings -> Palindromes / Manacher
strings/palindromes.summary: Odd/even palindrome radii on one static string, with Manacher as the exact linear-time baseline.

strings/eertree.title: Strings -> Eertree / Palindromic Tree
strings/eertree.summary: Append-only palindrome dictionary with one node per distinct palindrome and suffix links over palindromic suffixes.

strings/z-function.title: Strings -> Z-Function
strings/z-function.summary: Maintain a Z-box to measure longest prefix matches at every position and solve period/border problems efficiently.

strings/trie.title: Strings -> Trie
strings/trie.summary: Prefix trees for dictionary queries, prefix counting, lexicographic traversal, and automaton building blocks.

strings/aho-corasick.title: Strings -> Aho-Corasick
strings/aho-corasick.summary: Dictionary automaton for multi-pattern matching with failure and output links.

strings/suffix-array-lcp.title: Strings -> Suffix Array And LCP
strings/suffix-array-lcp.summary: Sorted suffix views and LCP arrays for substring order, uniqueness, and offline pattern search.

strings/suffix-automaton.title: Strings -> Suffix Automaton
strings/suffix-automaton.summary: Compact automaton of all substrings, with endpos classes, clones, and counting applications.

geometry/vector-orientation.title: Geometry -> Vector And Orientation
geometry/vector-orientation.summary: Dot, cross, orientation, signed area, and exact integer geometry as the basis of most planar algorithms.

geometry/segment-intersection.title: Geometry -> Segment Intersection
geometry/segment-intersection.summary: Robust orientation tests, on-segment handling, and degenerate cases for line and segment intersection.

geometry/polygon-area-point-location.title: Geometry -> Polygon Area And Point Location
geometry/polygon-area-point-location.summary: Shoelace formula, point-in-polygon logic, and careful boundary handling in planar geometry.

geometry/convex-hull.title: Geometry -> Convex Hull
geometry/convex-hull.summary: Build hulls with monotone chain or Graham scan, then exploit hull order for rotating-calipers style tasks.

geometry/sweep-line.title: Geometry -> Sweep Line
geometry/sweep-line.summary: Sort events and maintain an active structure while a conceptual line moves across the plane.

geometry/counting-geometry.title: Geometry -> Counting Geometry
geometry/counting-geometry.summary: Count intersections, lattice points, or union areas by mixing geometry primitives with combinatorics and data structures.

learning_sources.label: USACO Guide range queries with sweep line

geometry/right-triangles.title: Geometry -> Right Triangles
geometry/right-triangles.summary: A focused counting-geometry subtopic around perpendicular vectors, normalized slopes, and pivot-based counting.

greedy/prefix-constraints.title: Greedy -> Prefix Constraints
greedy/prefix-constraints.summary: Greedy selection under prefix or feasibility quotas, usually proved with exchange arguments and heap maintenance.

advanced/constructive.title: Advanced -> Constructive
advanced/constructive.summary: Output-sensitive problems where the main work is proving the existence and structure of a valid construction.

advanced/randomized-algorithms.title: Advanced -> Randomized Algorithms
advanced/randomized-algorithms.summary: Monte Carlo and Las Vegas design, amplification, randomized rounding, and probability-backed correctness guarantees.

advanced/algorithm-engineering.title: Advanced -> Algorithm Engineering
advanced/algorithm-engineering.summary: Performance work beyond asymptotics: benchmarks, cache behavior, memory layout, and reproducible measurements.

advanced/complexity-and-hardness.title: Advanced -> Complexity And Hardness
advanced/complexity-and-hardness.summary: Reductions, hardness classes, and the language for understanding when exact efficient algorithms are unlikely.

advanced/approximation-and-relaxation.title: Advanced -> Approximation And Relaxation
advanced/approximation-and-relaxation.summary: Approximation ratios, LP/SDP relaxations, primal-dual methods, and the boundary between exact and near-optimal algorithms.

advanced/optimization-and-duality.title: Advanced -> Optimization And Duality
advanced/optimization-and-duality.summary: LP duality, convex relaxation, and the optimization language that later feeds into flow, DP tricks, and aliens-style reasoning.

advanced/contest-engineering.title: Advanced -> Contest Engineering
advanced/contest-engineering.summary: Operational discipline for contests: local testing, checkers, interactive handling, notebook curation, and environment parity.
